prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `00576224`.
codex_response:
Implemented `00576224` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: tile the 2x2 input horizontally three times, vertically mirror that 2x6 strip for the middle band, then append the original strip again. The `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` hint was used because it matched the official examples; no `notes.md` or new DSL primitive was needed.

Code is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_00576224/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_00576224/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_00576224/generator.py#L1). The generator stays in-family by sampling only clean 2x2 nonzero motifs with 3-4 colors and non-constant rows, so the mirrored middle band remains visually meaningful.

Validation passed on the official examples, 20 sampled generated cases, and all 1000 built examples. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/00576224/task.json), [examples/](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/00576224/examples), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/00576224/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/00576224/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/00576224/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/00576224/previews/preview_03.png).
